backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Revision Reminder app that manages topics, spaced-repetition reminders (1-day through 3-month intervals), and study logs with functions to add topics, get due reminders, mark reminders done, and retrieve study progress.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new actor state, specifically renaming the '30-day' interval label to '1-month' in existing reminders while preserving all other data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend features—updating DueReminders to show due-date labels and updating TopicManager to display all five intervals with scheduled dates—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in styling, data fetching, utilities, and UI components for the Revision Reminder app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full page layout with a sticky header, hero image banner, the three main sections (TopicManager, DueReminders, StudyGrowthChart), and a branded footer.
frontend/src/components/DueReminders.tsx: React component that fetches and displays due reminders sorted by interval order, with color-coded interval badges, human-readable labels from INTERVAL_DISPLAY, and a mark-done button per reminder.
frontend/src/components/StudyGrowthChart: React component rendering a Recharts area chart of cumulative study revisions over time, with a stats summary row and an empty-state placeholder when no data exists.
frontend/src/components/TopicManager.tsx: React component that displays a list of study topics with expandable interval details and a form to add new topics, using TanStack Query hooks for data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating topics, due reminders, and study progress via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's design tokens using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/chartHelpers.ts: Utility functions for transforming raw study progress data (bigint nanosecond timestamps) into cumulative chart data points with formatted labels.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Utility functions and constants for converting nanosecond timestamps, computing spaced-repetition due dates, and formatting human-readable date and interval labels.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, fonts, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for a Revision Reminder App with spaced repetition scheduling, listing existing features, architectural notes, and fix requests.
